allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import faster_whisper, numpy, pyaudio; print\('deps ok'\)")
Bash(timeout 120 uvx ruff check src/core/config.py src/core/phrases.py src/core/oobe.py src/core/main.py src/plugins/zz_base.py)
Bash(timeout 120 uvx ruff format --check src/core/config.py src/core/phrases.py src/core/oobe.py src/core/main.py src/plugins/zz_base.py)
Bash(timeout -s SIGABRT 60 .venv/bin/python -X faulthandler -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider -o faulthandler_timeout=12 "tests/core/test_main.py::TestEchoBaseRun")
Bash(timeout -s SIGABRT 200 env PATH=__TRACKED_VAR__/.venv/bin:__TRACKED_VAR__ .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider -o faulthandler_timeout=30)
